ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data point */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sales data was generated */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the sales data */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week when the sales data was generated */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was generated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from sales */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Total cost associated with sales */,
  "gross_margin" TEXT /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted sales value */,
  "weeks_ahead" INTEGER /* Number of weeks ahead for which the prediction is made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point associated with the prediction */,
  "weeks_ahead" INTEGER /* Number of weeks ahead for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_value" TEXT /* Predicted sales value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "model_used" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the forecasting model */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecasting model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_model_sales_data" (
  "model_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point associated with the forecasting model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric for the forecasting model performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_model_sales_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_model_sales_data_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., business analyst, sales manager, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., sales increase, sales decrease) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification was sent for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point associated with the audit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data point associated with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing data, incorrect data) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)
